meta.notes: E4B inconsistently engages thinking mode - run1 produced 320 tokens (thinking), run2 produced 30 tokens (direct). See dev210-gemma4-nothink-comparison for suppressed variant.

tests.name: tool_call_dual
tests.prompt: What is the weather in San Francisco and what time is it in Tokyo?
tests.notes: Run 2 (efficient - no thinking). Run 1 took 29.4s/320tok with thinking engaged.

tests.name: agentic_file_read
tests.prompt: Read the file at src/main.py and tell me what it does

tests.name: multi_step_agentic
tests.prompt: Fix the login bug in auth.py - search, read, then fix
tests.notes: Only single-step. Generated many tokens before calling tool.

tests.name: simple_chat
tests.prompt: Explain what a REST API is in 2 sentences.
tests.notes: Most efficient chat response of any Gemma 4 variant - actually answered in 2 sentences

tests.name: code_gen_500
tests.prompt: Write a Python REST API for a todo list
